selection_policy: A bounded cohort covers one clean exact-resolution path, one no-assets and transport-blocked path, and one source-specific adapter path. It is not a coverage claim.

sources.why_selected: F-0 has an exact resolved clean candidate with body and attributable attachment metadata.
sources.main_evidence: data/notice-sources.csv and F-0 review read model.
sources.expected_phase_l_coverage: First end-to-end success slice through graph, review, preview, replay, and rollback evidence.
sources.known_blocker: Live detail mapping must still be verified in the authorized non-production environment.
sources.success_criteria: Exact resolution, attributable detail/body/asset evidence, idempotent replay, reviewer parity, and controlled preview are proven.

sources.why_selected: F-0 has a clean text-sufficient no-assets case and H records a local TLS-chain failure that must remain fail-closed.
sources.main_evidence: data/notice-sources.csv, F-0 review read model, and H live closure report.
sources.personal_engine_evidence: Personal source-health evidence preserves TLS/transport failure as a diagnostic condition.
sources.expected_phase_l_coverage: No-assets policy, transport failure visibility, and non-leakage through the controlled projection.
sources.known_blocker: Local TLS validation failed in prior evidence; this is not evidence of source absence or deletion.
sources.success_criteria: The source either supplies attributable evidence in the authorized environment or remains explicitly blocked with no public leakage.

sources.organization_source: Yonsei Underwood International College notice board
sources.why_selected: The source provides a distinct adapter shape beyond the CAU boards and is present in the committed main registry.
sources.main_evidence: data/notice-sources.csv contains the exact source key.
sources.personal_engine_evidence: Roadmap Phase 7 source-health evidence identifies ADAPTER:yonsei_uic and records its weak/zero-match condition.
sources.expected_phase_l_coverage: Source-specific adapter, pagination/detail resolution, and explicit unresolved handling.
sources.known_blocker: Current personal evidence has no verified scholarship match; this source cannot be treated as empty or public-ready.
sources.success_criteria: The adapter emits an attributable result or a reproducible blocked/unresolved result with no automatic source creation.
